LanguageData.UB_More_Replicant.title: Replicant
LanguageData.UB_More_Replicant.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was part of a line of androids that were designed to be indistinguishable from humans. Despite their ingenious design, their lack of significant advantages over regular humans lead to them being mostly discontinued.
LanguageData.UB_More_Childworker.title: Child Worker
LanguageData.UB_More_Childworker.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was made to work in an urbworld factory producing a part which [PAWN_nameDef] still doesn't know the purpose of.
LanguageData.UB_More_Smart_Aleck.title: Smart Aleck
LanguageData.UB_More_Smart_Aleck.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was always at the top of [PAWN_possessive] class, but [PAWN_possessive] classmates found [PAWN_possessive] constant trivia to be annoying.
LanguageData.UB_More_Sacrifice.title: Sacrifice
LanguageData.UB_More_Sacrifice.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born to be ritually sacrificed and have [PAWN_possessive] flesh consumed by the congregation. A criminal investigator helped [PAWN_objective] to escape. [PAWN_nameDef] still remembers what [PAWN_pronoun] learned on the compound.
LanguageData.UB_More_Raisedbyapes.title: Raised by Apes
LanguageData.UB_More_Raisedbyapes.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was part of a line of androids that were designed to be indistinguishable from humans. Despite their ingenious design, their lack of significant advantages over regular humans lead to them being mostly discontinued.
LanguageData.UB_More_Coalkid.title: Coal Miner
LanguageData.UB_More_Coalkid.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was part of a line of androids that were designed to be indistinguishable from humans. Despite their ingenious design, their lack of significant advantages over regular humans lead to them being mostly discontinued.
LanguageData.UB_More_Anklebiter.title: Anklebiter
LanguageData.UB_More_Anklebiter.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was part of a line of androids that were designed to be indistinguishable from humans. Despite their ingenious design, their lack of significant advantages over regular humans lead to them being mostly discontinued.
LanguageData.UB_More_Junkkid.title: Junk Kid
LanguageData.UB_More_Junkkid.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was part of a line of androids that were designed to be indistinguishable from humans. Despite their ingenious design, their lack of significant advantages over regular humans lead to them being mostly discontinued.
LanguageData.UB_More_PopularBully.title: Popular bully
LanguageData.UB_More_PopularBully.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was the schoolbully and would force other students to do [PAWN_possessive] homework. Despite [PAWN_nameDef]'s behavior, other students were eager to be around [PAWN_objective], especially the students that wanted to be just like [PAWN_nameDef].
LanguageData.UB_More_TheaterKid.title: Theater Kid
LanguageData.UB_More_TheaterKid.description: [PAWN_nameDef] never shy'd away from the melodramatic. [PAWN_nameDef] has starred in dozens of productions showcasing teenage angst, violence, and a face value view of romance.
LanguageData.UB_More_Bandit.title: Uneducated bandit
LanguageData.UB_More_Bandit.description: [PAWN_nameDef] didn't need none of that "booklernin". [PAWN_nameDef] learned everything [PAWN_pronoun] needed to know about, like making weapons, killing, and raiding, and [PAWN_nameDef]'s never seen a book that covers all of that. Although, that might also be because [PAWN_pronoun] can't read.
LanguageData.UB_More_CloneDiver.title: Clone Diver
LanguageData.UB_More_CloneDiver.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was vatgrown for the purpose of harvesting algae off the ocean floor on a land-less world. While not the most glamorous of jobs, [PAWN_nameDef] enjoyed the beautiful scenery. [PAWN_possessive] time underwater prevented [PAWN_objective] from having many friends.
LanguageData.UB_More_ChildSoldier.title: Child Soldier
LanguageData.UB_More_ChildSoldier.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born to be a soldier in a great war. After spending their whole childhood preparing for battle, peacetalks with rival nations ended [PAWN_possessive] chance to become a hero. Although they didn't get a true education, [PAWN_possessive] time working in the cantine taught them how to make a mean grill cheese sandwhich.
LanguageData.UB_More_FaithHealer.title: Faith Healer
LanguageData.UB_More_FaithHealer.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was the child of a doctor left behind on a tribal world. [PAWN_pronoun] used [PAWN_possessive] knowledge of medicine to heal the people, disguising [PAWN_possessive] true methods with rituals and magical rites. Disinfecting a wound became the ritual of Blood and Wine, while the act of putting pressure on a wound became the Pounding of Sin. [PAWN_nameDef]'s actions made [PAWN_objective] popular among the tribes.
